Basic information

Origin:China

Length (inches):48.82

Product features:

  • Decorative Pet Cages: Our dog cage furniture stands out with its stylish design. It's not just a dog cage; it can also be used as a TV stand, side table, and bedside table, perfectly integrating into your living room or bedroom décor.
  • Unique Arched Door: Our furniture-style dog crates feature a novel arched design, creating a clean, tidy, and comfortable living environment for you. The doors on the front and sides provide your dog with easy access to their crate.
  • Ample Storage Space: Two spacious drawers can neatly store pet supplies (toys, treats, leashes, etc.), while the large countertop can be used as a display area for decorations and books, keeping your home tidy and stylish.
  • Anti-Chewing and Escape-proof: We understand the importance of protecting your pet. Therefore, our large dog cages are made with 0.3-inch steel tubing, high-quality MDF, and a double-lock design to ensure they are anti-chewing and escape-proof.
  • Elegant Design: Timeless White Drawer with Vintage Black HandleThis drawer showcases a refined blend of elegance and functionality, featuring a pristine white panel paired with a vintage-inspired black handle. The recessed handle adds a touch of sophistication, while the smooth, durable painted finish ensures long-lasting performance. A perfect addition to elevate the style of any modern home or office space.
  • Size Suitable for Your Dog: Internal dimensions are 41.3 inches (L) x 21.3inches (W) x 22.8 inches (H). This dog crate is suitable for medium to large breeds, such as Border Collies, Golden Retrievers, and Huskies. The maximum weight capacity is 100 pounds. Please choose the appropriate size according to your needs.
